segments.text: Two vehicles fully involved heavy smoke near the building.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Confirm civilian presence near the fire.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Two civilians located at safe distance being monitored.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Begin fire suppression on nearest burning vehicle.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Command here, engine one, affirmative advancing hose line toward closest vehicle, listening.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Command here, engine one, request thermal imagery to assess heat spread to nearby vehicles, listening.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Engine one here, command thermal data incoming.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Confirm extension risk to building, listening.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Command here, engine one, received heat detected near facade.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Command check building for possible occupants inside.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Proceed to second vehicle after knockdown.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: listening command here engine one understood continuing suppression and monitoring surrounding vehicles finished
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
